result.finding: SLF4J with Logback (Spring Boot default) used for structured logging in 4 classes. No APM/telemetry, no AOP framework detected. Logging levels configured via application.properties per environment profile.
evidence: 4 classes use SLF4J Logger: PhotoServiceImpl, PhotoFileController, DetailController, HomeController
No logback.xml or log4j2.xml — uses Spring Boot default Logback configuration
No APM/telemetry dependencies: no applicationinsights, opentelemetry, newrelic, datadog, or elastic-apm in pom.xml
No @Aspect, @Before, @After, @Around annotations — no AOP framework used
values: Logging: SLF4J API + Logback (Spring Boot default)
